title: Melange Marinade Delight
description: A unique dish made with the exotic spice melange, marinated in a mixture of flavors.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together the marinade and melange.
2. Add the thinly sliced And to the marinade mixture.
3. Mix well to coat the And evenly.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
5. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
6. Remove the And from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
7. Grill the And for 3-4 minutes per side, or until tender and slightly charred.
